name: The Permanent Undersecretary Clause
text:
Permanents you control can't be destroyed, exiled, returned to hand, or otherwise removed by spells or abilities that an opponent controls, unless that opponent first files a removal request in triplicate (pays {3}, then rolls three six-sided dice and gets three matching results). They will not.
You are, after all, permanent. It's in the name.
flavorText: Three administrations tried to abolish the position. The position abolished them.

extras.interaction: forces opponents to roll dice to interact
